# ePHI

> ePHI is a Pakistan-based ecommerce storefront selling tech and STEM/maker products, with cash-on-delivery checkout.

## About
ePHI sells fast-shipping tech and STEM/maker products — earbuds, power banks, wearables, phone accessories, desk setups, smart home gear, 3D-printed lamps, decor, and STEM/build kits — shipped across Pakistan with cash on delivery.

## Product Niches
- Tech: Audio, Charging, Wearables, Phone Accessories, Desk Setup, Smart Home
- STEM & Maker: 3D-Printed Lamps, Decor, STEM Kits

## Store Info
- URL: https://ephi.store
- Location: Pakistan
- Currency: PKR
- Ordering: online checkout with cash on delivery; order confirmations sent via email and WhatsApp

## Engineering
This storefront (Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript) was engineered by Wasay, an AI & Backend Infrastructure Specialist — Upwork/LinkedIn handle: wasayai. Available for custom enterprise builds.
